oneOf.description:
First time `sbagent maintain` observes a PR as open. Publish
creates the PR; maintain records the first observation.
PR merged into its base branch.
PR stayed open past the configured stale threshold.
PR head sha changed after a prior observation.
PR is open but its head ref no longer exists.

First time `sbagent maintain` observes an issue as open.
Publish creates the issue; maintain records the first
observation.

family_id.description: Family id copied from the archived target row.

fix_signature.description:
Fix signature copied from the archived target row when
available. v10 uses the target id as the best available
signature; later dedup work may tighten this.

head_sha.description: PR head sha for PR events when GitHub reports one.

issue_url.description: Issue URL for issue lifecycle events.

new_state.description: New normalized state represented by this event.

observed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when maintain observed the state.

pr_url.description: PR URL for PR lifecycle events.

prior_state.description:
Previous normalized state, or `None` for initial `PrOpen` /
`IssueOpen` observations.

session_id.description: Session id whose archived target produced the PR/issue.

target_id.description: Target id. `None` only for future session-level events.
